criteria_results.description: W MobileBottomBar.tsx nie ma importu useObjectCreation ani żadnego wywołania handleAddIcon lub handleAddText
criteria_results.evidence: File 'client/src/components/editor/MobileBottomBar.tsx' does not contain 'useObjectCreation', 'handleAddIcon', or 'handleAddText'. Verified by reading the entire file.

criteria_results.description: W MobileBottomBar.tsx nie ma sekcji JSX z nagłówkiem 'Add Object' ani przyciskami tworzącymi obiekty (circle, camera, square, triangle, hexagon, arrow-right, text)
criteria_results.evidence: The JSX for 'mode === "list"' (lines 72-106) only contains the 'Layer Objects' section. 'Add Object' header and creation buttons are removed.

criteria_results.description: W MobileBottomBar.tsx nie ma przycisku usuwającego obiekt (variant='destructive' z DELETE_OBJECTS dispatch)
criteria_results.evidence: The string 'DELETE_OBJECTS' and 'variant="destructive"' are absent from the file.

criteria_results.description: W trybie 'edit' MobileBottomBar nadal renderuje Input do edycji name oraz komponent ObjectPhotoGallery
criteria_results.evidence: Lines 116-124 contain the Input for name editing with UPDATE_OBJECTS dispatch, and line 128 renders ObjectPhotoGallery.

criteria_results.description: W trybie 'list' MobileBottomBar nadal renderuje listę obiektów (Layer Objects) umożliwiającą ich zaznaczenie
criteria_results.evidence: Lines 75-104 render the 'Layer Objects' list, and line 91 handles the SELECT_OBJECT dispatch on click.

criteria_results.description: Nieużywane importy ikon (Circle, Square, Triangle, Hexagon, Camera, ArrowRight, Trash2) zostały usunięte z MobileBottomBar.tsx
criteria_results.evidence: The lucide-react import block (lines 4-11) only contains ChevronUp, ChevronDown, ChevronLeft, Plus, and Type. The requested icons have been removed.

next_focus: The implementation is correct and meets all acceptance criteria. No further action needed.
